displayTitle: X-Wing vs Tie Fighter - Balance of Power Campaigns
synopsis: Real-time against real pilots; this is Star Wars space combat as it was meant to be! Featuring challenging real-time dogfights of 2 to 8 players, Star Wars™: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter is one of the most historically significant space combat simulators ever made.
title: Star Wars X-Wing vs Tie Fighter - Balance of Power Campaigns
